x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: ACC telemetry is the continuous data feed that powers DEX AI diagnosis. Without active telemetry flow, DEX AI cannot perform real-time endpoint health analysis or proactive anomaly detection.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Confirm multilingual Now Assist language pack licensing with your ServiceNow account team. For initial rollout, prioritize English KB article quality. Create English-language versions of high-traffic non-English articles.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c04
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[ACC telemetry is the continuous data feed that powers DEX AI diagnosis. Without active telemetry flow, DEX AI cannot perform real-time endpoint health analysis or proactive anomaly detection.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>KB Language Consistency</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("kb_knowledge");
    gaTotal.addQuery("workflow_state", "published");
    gaTotal.addQuery("active", true);
    gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: "not_applicable", actualValue: "No published KB articles found",
            finding: "No published KB articles found. Language consistency cannot be assessed." };
    }

    // Count articles with language explicitly set to a non-English value.
    // Articles with NULL/empty language field are treated as English --
    // most orgs never set this field even for English content.
    var gaNonEng = new GlideAggregate("kb_knowledge");
    gaNonEng.addQuery("workflow_state", "published");
    gaNonEng.addQuery("active", true);
    gaNonEng.addNotNullQuery("language");
    gaNonEng.addQuery("language", "NOT IN", "en,en_US,en_us,english,English");
    gaNonEng.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaNonEng.query();
    var nonEng = gaNonEng.next() ? parseInt(gaNonEng.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;

    // Count articles with null language (treated as English)
    var gaNull = new GlideAggregate("kb_knowledge");
    gaNull.addQuery("workflow_state", "published");
    gaNull.addQuery("active", true);
    gaNull.addNullQuery("language");
    gaNull.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaNull.query();
    var nullLang = gaNull.next() ? parseInt(gaNull.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((nonEng / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + "% explicitly non-English articles (" + nonEng + " of " + total + ")" +
        (nullLang > 0 ? " | " + nullLang + " with no language set (treated as English)" : "");

    if (pct <= 10) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "Only " + pct + "% of published articles are explicitly non-English. Now Assist AI Search has primarily English content." };
    } else if (pct <= 30) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + "% of published articles are non-English (target: ≤10%). Confirm multilingual Now Assist language pack licensing for non-English content coverage." };
    } else {
        return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + "% of published articles are non-English. High non-English rate without confirmed multilingual licensing will result in poor Now Assist AI Search accuracy for those articles." };
    }
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005944</number>
<order>50</order>
<remediation_guidance>Confirm multilingual Now Assist language pack licensing with your ServiceNow account team. For initial rollout, prioritize English KB article quality. Create English-language versions of high-traffic non-English articles.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c04</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
